# DryUI

> Human-led, agent-assisted UI for building web apps with 165 reusable components, theme tokens, route patterns, and validation checks.

## Packages

- @dryui/primitives: Headless, unstyled components
- @dryui/ui: Styled components with CSS variables and theme system
- @dryui/mcp: MCP server with ask/check tools for discovery, setup guidance, and static validation (contract, a11y, tokens, CSS discipline)
- @dryui/cli: CLI for setup, check, detect, install, project-aware add, lookup, composition guidance, tokens, and feedback tooling

## Human-Led Agent-Assisted Workflow

DryUI gives engineers and coding agents a shared UI system: reusable components, themeable defaults, route and interface patterns, and validation before changes ship.

## Agent Support

- MCP tools: ask, check
- CLI commands: setup, init, detect, install, add, info, list, compose, tokens, check, ambient, install-hook, feedback, prompt

## First-party docs

- [Home](https://dryui.dev/): Human-led, agent-assisted UI for reusable components, themes, and route patterns
- [Getting Started](https://dryui.dev/getting-started): Install the DryUI skill, wire the app, add themes, and build with components
- [Feedback loop](https://dryui.dev/feedback-loop): Collect visual annotations from a running app and resolve them with an agent

## Installation

```
npx skills add rob-balfre/dryui
```

```
dryui init
# or, in an existing app
dryui detect .
dryui install .
```

```
bun add @dryui/ui
```

## Theme Setup

```html
<!-- In your root layout or app entry -->
<link rel="stylesheet" href="@dryui/ui/themes/default.css" />
<link rel="stylesheet" href="@dryui/ui/themes/dark.css" />
```

```html
<!-- Preferred default: follow the browser/OS theme -->
<html class="theme-auto" />
```

Use `data-theme="light"` or `data-theme="dark"` only for explicit overrides. If you build a theme toggle, persist the explicit override and keep system mode as the fallback.

## Components

### Category: Action

### Button
Interactive button or link-styled action for submissions and calls to action.
Import: @dryui/ui
Subpath import: @dryui/ui/button
Props: variant (| 'solid'
	| 'outline'
	| 'ghost'
	| 'soft'
	| 'secondary'
	| 'link'
	| 'bare'
	| 'trigger'
	| 'nav'
	| 'tab'
	| 'toggle'
	| 'pill'), Button treatment from solid primary actions to ghost and inline link styles., accepted solid, outline, ghost, soft, secondary, link, bare, trigger, nav, tab, toggle, pill, default 'solid' | size ('sm' | 'md' | 'lg' | 'icon' | 'icon-sm' | 'icon-lg'), Button density preset, including icon-only sizing variants., accepted sm, md, lg, icon, icon-sm, icon-lg, default 'md' | color ('primary' | 'danger' | 'ink' | (string & {}) | null), Semantic tone. 'primary' and 'danger' are brand/error. 'ink' renders a solid near-black editorial CTA that auto-inverts in dark theme via --dry-color-bg-inverse/--dry-color-text-inverse. Any other string is passed through as a data-color hook for custom presets., accepted primary, danger, ink, null, default 'primary' | className (string) | disabled (boolean), Prevents interaction and applies disabled styling., default false | href (string), Destination URL when the component renders as a link., When provided, Button renders an anchor instead of a button for link-style actions. | rel (string), Relationship between the current document and the linked resource. | target (string), Browsing context used for link navigation. | download (boolean | string), Requests download behavior when the component renders as a link. | type ('button' | 'submit' | 'reset'), HTML type attribute or component-specific type selector., accepted button, submit, reset, default 'button' | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
Data attributes: data-color (Reflects the resolved color preset. 'ink' is a solid near-black editorial CTA that auto-inverts in dark theme., values primary, danger, ink) | data-disabled (Present when the component or part is disabled.) | data-dry-button | data-dry-icon | data-group-orientation | data-icon-end | data-icon-start | data-in-group | data-optical | data-size | data-variant
Accessibility: Provide discernible text or an aria-label for icon-only buttons. | Use the href prop for navigation so the element keeps link semantics.
Example: <Button variant="solid" onclick={handleClick}>Save</Button>

### Toggle
Pressable toggle button.
Import: @dryui/ui
Subpath import: @dryui/ui/toggle
Props: size ('sm' | 'md' | 'lg'), Size preset affecting density, spacing, or typography., accepted sm, md, lg, default 'md' | icon (Snippet) | pressed (boolean), default false, bindable | disabled (boolean), Prevents interaction and applies disabled styling. | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component.
Data attributes: data-disabled (Present when the component or part is disabled.) | data-size | data-state
Accessibility: Provide discernible text or an aria-label for controls that do not expose visible text. | Use button semantics for in-place actions and link semantics for navigation.
Example: <Toggle>Content</Toggle>

### ToggleGroup
Group of toggle buttons with single/multiple selection.
Import: @dryui/ui
Subpath import: @dryui/ui/toggle-group
Parts: Root, Item
Props: Root: size ('sm' | 'md' | 'lg'), Size preset affecting density, spacing, or typography., accepted sm, md, lg, default 'md' | type ('single' | 'multiple'), HTML type attribute or component-specific type selector., accepted single, multiple, default 'single' | value (string[]), Current controlled or bindable value., default [], bindable | disabled (boolean), Prevents interaction and applies disabled styling., default false | orientation ('horizontal' | 'vertical'), Horizontal or vertical layout direction., accepted horizontal, vertical, default 'horizontal' | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | Item: value (string), Current controlled or bindable value., required | disabled (boolean), Prevents interaction and applies disabled styling. | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
Data attributes: data-disabled (Present when the component or part is disabled.) | data-orientation (Reflects the current horizontal or vertical orientation., values horizontal, vertical) | data-part | data-size | data-state
Accessibility: Provide discernible text or an aria-label for controls that do not expose visible text. | Use button semantics for in-place actions and link semantics for navigation.
Example: <ToggleGroup.Root>

### ThemeToggle
Persisted light/dark theme switcher with system-preference fallback.
Import: @dryui/ui
Subpath import: @dryui/ui/theme-toggle
Props: storageKey (string) | size ('sm' | 'md' | 'lg'), Size preset affecting density, spacing, or typography., accepted sm, md, lg, default 'md' | controller (ThemeController) | sunIcon (Snippet) | moonIcon (Snippet) | onModeChange ((mode: ThemeMode) => void) | disabled (boolean), Prevents interaction and applies disabled styling. | class (ClassValue)
Data attributes: data-dry-icon-reveal | data-hidden | data-mode | data-theme-switch
Accessibility: Keep the default aria-label or pass a custom one so the purpose of the button is announced. | The Alt-click and Escape shortcuts return to system mode; do not remove them in custom wrappers so users can opt back into prefers-color-scheme.
Example: <ThemeToggle storageKey="my-app-theme" />

### Clipboard
Copy text to clipboard with native Clipboard API.
Import: @dryui/ui
Subpath import: @dryui/ui/clipboard
Props: value (string), Current controlled or bindable value., required | timeout (number), default 2000 | children (Snippet<[{ copied: boolean; copy: () => void }]>), Content rendered inside the component., required
Data attributes: data-clipboard | data-copied
Accessibility: Provide discernible text or an aria-label for controls that do not expose visible text. | Use button semantics for in-place actions and link semantics for navigation.
Example: <Clipboard>Content</Clipboard>

### ScrollToTop
Button that scrolls to top of page or container.
Import: @dryui/ui
Subpath import: @dryui/ui/scroll-to-top
Props: position ('bottom-right' | 'bottom-left' | 'bottom-center'), accepted bottom-right, bottom-left, bottom-center, default 'bottom-right' | class (string) | threshold (number), default 300 | target (HTMLElement), Browsing context used for link navigation. | behavior (ScrollBehavior), default 'smooth' | children (Snippet<[{ visible: boolean; scrollToTop: () => void }]>), Content rendered inside the component., required
Data attributes: data-position | data-visible
Accessibility: Provide discernible text or an aria-label for controls that do not expose visible text. | Use button semantics for in-place actions and link semantics for navigation. | Only add region semantics when the scrollable surface has a unique, meaningful label.
Example: <ScrollToTop>Content</ScrollToTop>

### FloatButton
Floating action button with expandable actions.
Import: @dryui/ui
Subpath import: @dryui/ui/float-button
Parts: Root, Trigger, Action
Props: Root: position ('bottom-right' | 'bottom-left'), accepted bottom-right, bottom-left, default 'bottom-right' | open (boolean), Whether the overlay or disclosure is currently open., default false, bindable | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | Trigger: size ('sm' | 'md' | 'lg'), Size preset affecting density, spacing, or typography., accepted sm, md, lg, default 'md' | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | Action: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
Data attributes: data-float-button | data-float-button-action | data-float-button-trigger | data-position | data-state
Accessibility: Provide discernible text or an aria-label for controls that do not expose visible text. | Use button semantics for in-place actions and link semantics for navigation.
Example: <FloatButton.Root>

### ButtonGroup
Groups related buttons with shared styling.
Import: @dryui/ui
Subpath import: @dryui/ui/button-group
Props: size ('sm' | 'md' | 'lg'), Size preset affecting density, spacing, or typography., accepted sm, md, lg, default 'md' | orientation ('horizontal' | 'vertical'), Horizontal or vertical layout direction., accepted horizontal, vertical, default 'horizontal' | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
Data attributes: data-button-group | data-orientation (Reflects the current horizontal or vertical orientation., values horizontal, vertical) | data-size
Accessibility: Provide discernible text or an aria-label for controls that do not expose visible text. | Use button semantics for in-place actions and link semantics for navigation.
Example: <ButtonGroup>Content</ButtonGroup>

### Chip
Interactive pill for filters, selections, and inline state.
Import: @dryui/ui
Subpath import: @dryui/ui/chip
Props: selected (boolean), Whether the current item is selected. | disabled (boolean), Prevents interaction and applies disabled styling. | variant ('solid' | 'outline' | 'soft'), Visual style preset for the component., accepted solid, outline, soft, default 'soft' | color (AliasableColor), Semantic color or tone applied to the component., default 'gray' | size ('sm' | 'md'), Size preset affecting density, spacing, or typography., accepted sm, md, default 'sm' | href (string), Destination URL when the component renders as a link. | rel (string), Relationship between the current document and the linked resource. | target (string), Browsing context used for link navigation. | download (boolean | string), Requests download behavior when the component renders as a link. | type ('button' | 'submit' | 'reset'), HTML type attribute or component-specific type selector., accepted button, submit, reset, default 'button' | onclick ((event: MouseEvent) => void) | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
Data attributes: data-chip-color | data-chip-selected | data-chip-size | data-chip-variant | data-disabled (Present when the component or part is disabled.) | data-selected (Present when the current item is selected.)
Accessibility: Provide discernible text or an aria-label for controls that do not expose visible text. | Use button semantics for in-place actions and link semantics for navigation.
Example: <Chip variant="soft" color="blue">Policy friendly</Chip>

### Category: Input

### Input
Text input with size variants.
Import: @dryui/ui
Subpath import: @dryui/ui/input
Props: size ('sm' | 'md' | 'lg'), Input density preset for compact, default, or spacious form layouts., accepted sm, md, lg, default 'md' | variant ('default' | 'ghost'), Visual style preset for the component., accepted default, ghost, default 'default' | value (string), Bindable text value for controlled input usage., default '', bindable | disabled (boolean), Prevents interaction and applies disabled styling., default false | type (string), Native input type such as text, email, password, or search.
Data attributes: data-disabled (Present when the component or part is disabled.) | data-invalid (Present when the current field value is invalid.) | data-size | data-variant
Accessibility: Pair Input with a visible Label or an aria-label so the field purpose is announced. | Use native type, autocomplete, and name attributes for expected keyboard and form behavior.
Example: <Input type="email" bind:value={email} placeholder="you@example.com" />

### Textarea
Multi-line text input.
Import: @dryui/ui
Subpath import: @dryui/ui/textarea
Props: size ('sm' | 'md' | 'lg'), Size preset affecting density, spacing, or typography., accepted sm, md, lg, default 'md' | value (string), Current controlled or bindable value., default '', bindable | disabled (boolean), Prevents interaction and applies disabled styling., default false
Data attributes: data-disabled (Present when the component or part is disabled.) | data-invalid (Present when the current field value is invalid.) | data-size
Accessibility: Pair the control with a visible label or aria-label and keep helper or error text programmatically associated. | Preserve expected keyboard entry, selection, and state announcements for the chosen input pattern.
Example: <Textarea bind:value={message} placeholder="Write a message…" />

### PromptInput
AI-style prompt input with auto-resize and submit.
Import: @dryui/ui
Subpath import: @dryui/ui/prompt-input
Props: value (string), Current controlled or bindable value., default '' | placeholder (string), Hint text shown when no value is selected or entered., default 'Type a message...' | disabled (boolean), Prevents interaction and applies disabled styling., default false | submitLabel (string), default 'Send' | submitSize (ButtonSize), default 'md' | submitVariant (ButtonVariant), default 'solid' | onpromptsubmit ((value: string) => void) | actions (Snippet)
Data attributes: data-disabled (Present when the component or part is disabled.) | data-part | data-prompt-actions | data-prompt-input | data-prompt-submit-label | data-prompt-textarea
Accessibility: Pair the control with a visible label or aria-label and keep helper or error text programmatically associated. | Preserve expected keyboard entry, selection, and state announcements for the chosen input pattern.
Example: <PromptInput>Content</PromptInput>

### NumberInput
Numeric input with increment/decrement controls.
Import: @dryui/ui
Subpath import: @dryui/ui/number-input
Props: size ('sm' | 'md' | 'lg'), Size preset affecting density, spacing, or typography., accepted sm, md, lg, default 'md', Adjusts input density and its default maximum width for compact counter-style fields. | value (number), Current controlled or bindable value., default 0, bindable | min (number), Minimum allowed value. | max (number), Maximum allowed value. | step (number), Step interval used when incrementing numeric values., default 1 | disabled (boolean), Prevents interaction and applies disabled styling., default false
Data attributes: data-disabled (Present when the component or part is disabled.) | data-number-input-wrapper | data-size
Accessibility: Pair the control with a visible label or aria-label and keep helper or error text programmatically associated. | Preserve expected keyboard entry, selection, and state announcements for the chosen input pattern.
Example: <NumberInput bind:value={quantity} min={0} max={100} step={1} size="sm" />

### Checkbox
Boolean toggle input with indeterminate state.
Import: @dryui/ui
Subpath import: @dryui/ui/checkbox
Props: size ('sm' | 'md' | 'lg'), Size preset affecting density, spacing, or typography., accepted sm, md, lg, default 'md' | checked (boolean), Current checked state for controlled or bindable usage., default false, bindable | indeterminate (boolean), default false | disabled (boolean), Prevents interaction and applies disabled styling., default false
Data attributes: data-disabled (Present when the component or part is disabled.) | data-invalid (Present when the current field value is invalid.) | data-size | data-state
Accessibility: Pair the checkbox with visible text or an aria-label so its purpose is announced.
Example: <Checkbox bind:checked={agreed}>I agree to the terms</Checkbox>

### RadioGroup
Single selection from multiple options.
Import: @dryui/ui
Subpath import: @dryui/ui/radio-group
Parts: Root, Item
Props: Root: value (string), Current controlled or bindable value., bindable | name (string), Field name used during native form submission. | disabled (boolean), Prevents interaction and applies disabled styling. | required (boolean) | orientation ('horizontal' | 'vertical'), Horizontal or vertical layout direction., accepted horizontal, vertical | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | Item: value (string), Current controlled or bindable value., required | disabled (boolean), Prevents interaction and applies disabled styling. | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component.
Data attributes: data-disabled (Present when the component or part is disabled.) | data-orientation (Reflects the current horizontal or vertical orientation., values horizontal, vertical) | data-radio-group-item | data-radio-group-root | data-state
Accessibility: Pair the control with a visible label or aria-label and keep helper or error text programmatically associated. | Preserve expected keyboard entry, selection, and state announcements for the chosen input pattern.
Example: <RadioGroup.Root>

### Slider
Range input slider with thumb control.
Import: @dryui/ui
Subpath import: @dryui/ui/slider
Props: size ('sm' | 'md' | 'lg'), Size preset affecting density, spacing, or typography., accepted sm, md, lg, default 'md' | variant ('default' | 'pill'), Visual style preset for the component., accepted default, pill, default 'default' | valueLabel (Snippet<[{ value: number; percentage: number }]>) | value (number), Current controlled or bindable value., default 50, bindable | min (number), Minimum allowed value., default 0 | max (number), Maximum allowed value., default 100 | step (number), Step interval used when incrementing numeric values., default 1 | disabled (boolean), Prevents interaction and applies disabled styling., default false | orientation ('horizontal' | 'vertical'), Horizontal or vertical layout direction., accepted horizontal, vertical, default 'horizontal'
Data attributes: data-disabled (Present when the component or part is disabled.) | data-orientation (Reflects the current horizontal or vertical orientation., values horizontal, vertical) | data-part | data-size | data-variant
Accessibility: Pair the control with a visible label or aria-label and keep helper or error text programmatically associated. | Preserve expected keyboard entry, selection, and state announcements for the chosen input pattern. | If content auto-advances, provide pause or stop controls and respect reduced-motion preferences.
Example: <Slider bind:value={volume} min={0} max={100} />

### InputGroup
Compound input wrapper that combines prefixes, suffixes, separators, select slots, and actions.
Import: @dryui/ui
Subpath import: @dryui/ui/input-group
Parts: Root, Prefix, Input, Suffix, Separator, Action, Select
Props: Input: value (string), Current controlled or bindable value., default '' | Select: value (string), Current controlled or bindable value., default '' | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component.
Data attributes: data-affix-group | data-disabled (Present when the component or part is disabled.) | data-input-group-action | data-input-group-caret | data-input-group-input | data-input-group-inputWrap | data-input-group-prefix | data-input-group-root | data-input-group-select | data-input-group-selectWrap | data-input-group-separator | data-input-group-suffix | data-invalid (Present when the current field value is invalid.) | data-orientation (Reflects the current horizontal or vertical orientation., values horizontal, vertical) | data-part | data-size
Accessibility: Pair the control with a visible label or aria-label and keep helper or error text programmatically associated. | Preserve expected keyboard entry, selection, and state announcements for the chosen input pattern.
Example: <InputGroup.Root>

### OptionPicker
Selectable option tiles with preview, label, and description for presets, fonts, shapes, and other visual choices.
Import: @dryui/ui
Subpath import: @dryui/ui/option-picker
Parts: Root, Item, Preview, Label, Description, Meta
Props: Root: columns (1 | 2 | 3 | 4), accepted 1, 2, 3, 4 | Item: layout ('inline' | 'stacked'), accepted inline, stacked, default 'inline' | size ('default' | 'compact' | 'visual'), Size preset affecting density, spacing, or typography., accepted default, compact, visual, default 'default' | unavailable (boolean), default false | Preview: color (string), Semantic color or tone applied to the component. | shape ('circle' | 'rounded' | 'square' | 'pill'), accepted circle, rounded, square, pill, default 'rounded' | variant ('default' | 'preset' | 'font' | 'shape'), Visual style preset for the component., accepted default, preset, font, shape, default 'default' | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component.
Data attributes: data-columns | data-disabled (Present when the component or part is disabled.) | data-layout | data-option-picker-description | data-option-picker-item | data-option-picker-label | data-option-picker-meta | data-option-picker-preview | data-option-picker-preview-shape | data-option-picker-root | data-orientation (Reflects the current horizontal or vertical orientation., values horizontal, vertical) | data-part | data-selected (Present when the current item is selected.) | data-shape | data-size | data-state | data-unavailable | data-value | data-variant
Accessibility: Pair the control with a visible label or aria-label and keep helper or error text programmatically associated. | Preserve expected keyboard entry, selection, and state announcements for the chosen input pattern.
Example: <OptionPicker.Root>

### Listbox
Single or multi-select list with keyboard navigation.
Import: @dryui/ui
Subpath import: @dryui/ui/listbox
Parts: Root, Item
Props: Root: value (string | string[]), Current controlled or bindable value., default '', bindable | multiple (boolean), default false | disabled (boolean), Prevents interaction and applies disabled styling., default false | onvaluechange ((value: string | string[]) => void) | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | Item: value (string), Current controlled or bindable value., required | disabled (boolean), Prevents interaction and applies disabled styling., default false | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
Data attributes: data-disabled (Present when the component or part is disabled.) | data-listbox-item | data-listbox-root | data-selected (Present when the current item is selected.) | data-value
Accessibility: Pair the control with a visible label or aria-label and keep helper or error text programmatically associated. | Preserve expected keyboard entry, selection, and state announcements for the chosen input pattern.
Example: <Listbox.Root>

### PinInput
Segmented input for PIN/OTP codes with single hidden input architecture.
Import: @dryui/ui
Subpath import: @dryui/ui/pin-input
Parts: Root, Group, Cell, Separator
Props: Root: size ('sm' | 'md' | 'lg'), Size preset affecting density, spacing, or typography., accepted sm, md, lg, default 'md' | variant ('outline' | 'flushed'), Visual style preset for the component., accepted outline, flushed, default 'outline' | value (string), Current controlled or bindable value., default '', bindable | length (number), default 4 | mask (boolean), default false | type ('numeric' | 'alphanumeric'), HTML type attribute or component-specific type selector., accepted numeric, alphanumeric, default 'numeric' | pattern (RegExp) | placeholder (string), Hint text shown when no value is selected or entered., default '○' | disabled (boolean), Prevents interaction and applies disabled styling., default false | oncomplete ((value: string) => void) | pasteTransformer ((text: string) => string) | blurOnComplete (boolean), default false | name (string), Field name used during native form submission. | children (Snippet<[{ cells: PinInputCellState[] }]>), Content rendered inside the component. | Group: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | Cell: cell (PinInputCellState), required | children (Snippet<[{ char: string | null; isActive: boolean; hasFakeCaret: boolean }]>), Content rendered inside the component. | Separator: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component.
Data attributes: data-active (Present on the active item or current target within the component.) | data-complete | data-disabled (Present when the component or part is disabled.) | data-error | data-inactive | data-mask | data-pin-input-caret | data-pin-input-cell | data-pin-input-group | data-pin-input-hidden | data-pin-input-lg | data-pin-input-md | data-pin-input-placeholder | data-pin-input-root | data-pin-input-separator | data-pin-input-sm | data-state | data-variant
Accessibility: Pair the control with a visible label or aria-label and keep helper or error text programmatically associated. | Preserve expected keyboard entry, selection, and state announcements for the chosen input pattern.
Example: <PinInput.Root bind:value={pin} length={6} oncomplete={handleVerify}>

### Rating

Data attributes: data-disabled (Present when the component or part is disabled.) | data-highlighted | data-readonly | data-size | data-state
Accessibility: Pair the control with a visible label or aria-label and keep helper or error text programmatically associated. | Preserve expected keyboard entry, selection, and state announcements for the chosen input pattern.
Example: <Rating bind:value={score} />

Data attributes: data-disabled (Present when the component or part is disabled.) | data-placeholder | data-time-display | data-time-input-wrapper | data-time-separator
Accessibility: Pair the control with a visible label or aria-label and keep helper or error text programmatically associated. | Preserve expected keyboard entry, selection, and state announcements for the chosen input pattern.
Example: <TimeInput>Content</TimeInput>

### TagsInput
Input for managing a list of tags.
Import: @dryui/ui
Subpath import: @dryui/ui/tags-input
Parts: Root, Input, Tag, TagDelete, List
Props: Root: size ('sm' | 'md' | 'lg'), Size preset affecting density, spacing, or typography., accepted sm, md, lg, default 'md' | value (string[]), Current controlled or bindable value., default [], bindable | maxTags (number), default 0 | allowDuplicates (boolean), default false | disabled (boolean), Prevents interaction and applies disabled styling., default false | onValueChange ((value: string[]) => void) | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | Input: placeholder (string), Hint text shown when no value is selected or entered. | Tag: index (number), required | value (string), Current controlled or bindable value., required, bindable | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component. | TagDelete: index (number), required | value (string), Current controlled or bindable value. | List: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
Data attributes: data-disabled (Present when the component or part is disabled.) | data-index | data-part | data-size
Accessibility: Pair the control with a visible label or aria-label and keep helper or error text programmatically associated. | Preserve expected keyboard entry, selection, and state announcements for the chosen input pattern.
Example: <TagsInput.Root>

### FileUpload
File selection with drag-and-drop dropzone.
Import: @dryui/ui
Subpath import: @dryui/ui/file-upload
Parts: Root, Dropzone, Trigger, List, Item, ItemDelete
Props: Root: files (File[]), bindable | accept (string) | multiple (boolean) | maxSize (number) | maxFiles (number) | disabled (boolean), Prevents interaction and applies disabled styling. | onFilesChange (((files: File[]) => void)) | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | Dropzone: size ('sm' | 'md' | 'lg'), Size preset affecting density, spacing, or typography., accepted sm, md, lg, default 'md' | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | Trigger: size ('sm' | 'md' | 'lg'), Size preset affecting density, spacing, or typography., accepted sm, md, lg | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | List: size ('sm' | 'md' | 'lg'), Size preset affecting density, spacing, or typography., accepted sm, md, lg, default 'md' | children (Snippet<[{ file: File; index: number }]>), Content rendered inside the component., required | Item: size ('sm' | 'md' | 'lg'), Size preset affecting density, spacing, or typography., accepted sm, md, lg, default 'md' | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component. | file (File), required | index (number), required | ItemDelete: index (number), required | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component.
Data attributes: data-disabled (Present when the component or part is disabled.) | data-dragging | data-fu-dropzone | data-fu-item | data-fu-item-name | data-fu-item-size | data-fu-list | data-index | data-size
Accessibility: Pair the control with a visible label or aria-label and keep helper or error text programmatically associated. | Preserve expected keyboard entry, selection, and state announcements for the chosen input pattern.
Example: <FileUpload.Root>

### FileSelect
Select a file or folder path via external picker.
Import: @dryui/ui
Subpath import: @dryui/ui/file-select
Parts: Root, Trigger, Value, Clear
Props: Root: value (string | null), Current controlled or bindable value., accepted null, default null | accept (string), default '' | directory (boolean), default true | onrequest ((() => Promise<string | null>)) | onchange (((value: string | null) => void)) | disabled (boolean), Prevents interaction and applies disabled styling., default false | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | Trigger: size ('sm' | 'md' | 'lg'), Size preset affecting density, spacing, or typography., accepted sm, md, lg | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | Value: placeholder (string), Hint text shown when no value is selected or entered., default 'No file selected' | Clear: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component.
Data attributes: data-disabled (Present when the component or part is disabled.) | data-file-select | data-fs-value | data-loading | data-placeholder
Accessibility: Pair the control with a visible label or aria-label and keep helper or error text programmatically associated. | Preserve expected keyboard entry, selection, and state announcements for the chosen input pattern.
Example: <FileSelect.Root>

### Transfer

Import: @dryui/ui

Parts: Root, List, Item, Actions
Props: Root: sourceItems (import('./context.svelte.js').TransferItem[]), default [], required, bindable | targetItems (import('./context.svelte.js').TransferItem[]), default [], bindable | onChange ((
		source: import('./context.svelte.js').TransferItem[],
		target: import('./context.svelte.js').TransferItem[]
	) => void) | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | List: filterable (boolean) | content (Snippet<[{ items: TransferItemType[] }]>) | type ('source' | 'target'), HTML type attribute or component-specific type selector., accepted source, target, required | title (string), Primary heading or label text. | children (Snippet<[{ items: import('./context.svelte.js').TransferItem[] }]>), Content rendered inside the component. | Item: key (string), required | type ('source' | 'target'), HTML type attribute or component-specific type selector., accepted source, target, required | disabled (boolean), Prevents interaction and applies disabled styling., default false | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | Actions: children (Snippet< [ { moveToTarget: () => void; moveToSource: () => void; moveAllToTarget: () => void; moveAllToSource: () => void; canMoveToTarget: boolean; canMoveToSource: boolean; } ] >), Content rendered inside the component.

Accessibility: Pair the control with a visible label or aria-label and keep helper or error text programmatically associated. | Preserve expected keyboard entry, selection, and state announcements for the chosen input pattern.
Example: <Transfer.Root>

### Select
Closed dropdown select for choosing one option from a fixed list.
Import: @dryui/ui
Subpath import: @dryui/ui/select
Parts: Root, Trigger, Content, Item, Value
Props: Root: open (boolean), Controls whether the select menu is currently expanded., bindable | value (string), Bindable selected value for the current option set., bindable | disabled (boolean), Prevents interaction and applies disabled styling. | name (string), Field name used during native form submission., Adds a hidden input so the selected value participates in native form submission. | options (Array<string | { value: string; label: string }>) | placeholder (string), Hint text shown when no value is selected or entered. | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component. | Trigger: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | Content: placement (| 'top'
	| 'top-start'
	| 'top-end'
	| 'bottom'
	| 'bottom-start'
	| 'bottom-end'
	| 'left'
	| 'left-start'
	| 'left-end'
	| 'right'
	| 'right-start'
	| 'right-end'), accepted top, top-start, top-end, bottom, bottom-start, bottom-end, left, left-start, left-end, right, right-start, right-end, default 'bottom-start' | offset (number), default 8 | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | Item: value (string), Current controlled or bindable value., required | disabled (boolean), Prevents interaction and applies disabled styling., default false | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | Value: placeholder (string), Hint text shown when no value is selected or entered., default ''
Data attributes: data-content | data-disabled (Present when the component or part is disabled.) | data-dry-stagger | data-indicator | data-placeholder | data-select-content | data-select-item | data-select-trigger | data-select-value | data-select-wrapper | data-size | data-state (Reflects whether the select surface is expanded or whether an option is active, depending on the part., values open, closed, checked, unchecked) | data-value
Accessibility: Provide surrounding field context and a name when the selected value needs to submit with a form.
Example: <Select.Root bind:value={selected} bind:open={selectOpen} name="selection">

	| 'top-start'
	| 'top-end'
	| 'bottom'
	| 'bottom-start'
	| 'bottom-end'
	| 'left'
	| 'left-start'
	| 'left-end'
	| 'right'
	| 'right-start'
	| 'right-end'), accepted top, top-start, top-end, bottom, bottom-start, bottom-end, left, left-start, left-end, right, right-start, right-end, default 'bottom-start' | offset (number), default 4 | loading (boolean), default false | loadingContent (Snippet) | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | Group: label (string), Visible label text shown for the control or item., required | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | Item: value (string), Current controlled or bindable value., required | textValue (string) | disabled (boolean), Prevents interaction and applies disabled styling., default false | icon (Snippet) | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | Empty: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | SelectionList: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | SelectionItem: value (string), Current controlled or bindable value., required | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component. | SelectionRemove: value (string), Current controlled or bindable value., required | label (string), Visible label text shown for the control or item.

### RangeCalendar

Import: @dryui/ui
Subpath import: @dryui/ui/range-calendar
Parts: Root, Grid
Props: Root: startDate (Date | null), default $bindable<Date | null>(null), bindable | endDate (Date | null), default $bindable<Date | null>(null), bindable | locale (string), default 'en-US' | min (Date | null), Minimum allowed value., default null | max (Date | null), Maximum allowed value., default null | disabled (boolean), Prevents interaction and applies disabled styling., default false | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | Grid: events (readonly CalendarEventItem[]) | eventDisplay (CalendarEventDisplay) | maxEventLanes (number) | visibleMonths (CalendarVisibleMonths) | eventContent (Snippet<[CalendarEventRenderContext]>)
Data attributes: data-calendar-day | data-calendar-header | data-disabled (Present when the component or part is disabled.) | data-in-range | data-outside-month | data-range-calendar-root | data-range-end | data-range-start | data-today
Accessibility: Pair the control with a visible label or aria-label and keep helper or error text programmatically associated. | Provide native name, autocomplete, and value wiring when the component participates in form submission.
Example: <RangeCalendar.Root>

### Category: Layout

### Container

Subpath import: @dryui/ui/container

Data attributes: data-padding | data-size
Accessibility: This component does not add meaning by itself; ensure child content supplies the required headings, labels, and landmarks. | Only add landmark or region semantics when the section has a unique, meaningful label.
Example: <Container>

	| 'blue'
	| 'red'
	| 'green'
	| 'yellow'
	| 'purple'
	| 'orange'
	| 'info'
	| 'success'
	| 'warning'
	| 'danger'), Semantic color or tone applied to the component., accepted gray, blue, red, green, yellow, purple, orange, info, success, warning, danger | size ('sm' | 'md'), Size preset affecting density, spacing, or typography., accepted sm, md

### Category: Navigation

### Tabs

Parts: Root, List, Trigger, Content
Props: Root: value (string), Bindable current tab value for controlled tab interfaces., default '' | orientation ('horizontal' | 'vertical'), Horizontal or vertical layout direction., accepted horizontal, vertical, default 'horizontal' | activationMode ('automatic' | 'manual'), accepted automatic, manual, default 'automatic' | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | List: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | Trigger: value (string), Tab identifier that activates the matching content panel., required | disabled (boolean), Prevents interaction and applies disabled styling. | size ('sm' | 'md' | 'lg'), Size preset affecting density, spacing, or typography., accepted sm, md, lg | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | Content: value (string), Current controlled or bindable value., required | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
Data attributes: data-disabled (Present when the component or part is disabled.) | data-orientation (Reflects the current horizontal or vertical orientation., values horizontal, vertical) | data-state (Reflects whether the tab trigger or panel is active., values active, inactive) | data-tabs-content | data-tabs-list | data-tabs-root
Accessibility: Give each Tabs.Trigger concise, descriptive text so keyboard and screen-reader users can scan options quickly. | Keep Tabs.List and Tabs.Content as siblings under Tabs.Root to preserve roving focus and aria wiring.
Example: <Tabs.Root bind:value={activeTab}>

Example: <Breadcrumb.Root>

### Category: Overlay

### Dialog

Import: @dryui/ui
Subpath import: @dryui/ui/dialog
Parts: Root, Trigger, Content, Overlay, Header, Body, Footer, Close
Props: Root: open (boolean), Controls whether the dialog is currently shown., default false | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | Trigger: children (Snippet), Interactive element that opens the dialog., required | Content: children (Snippet), Main dialog surface content rendered inside the modal., required | Header: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | Body: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | Footer: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | Close: children (Snippet), Label or content rendered inside the dismiss control., required
Data attributes: data-dialog-body | data-dialog-content | data-dialog-footer | data-dialog-header | data-dialog-panel | data-dialog-trigger | data-state (Reflects whether the dialog is open or closed., values open, closed)
Accessibility: Always provide a clear heading so the dialog context is announced when it opens. | Ensure there is an obvious close path for both keyboard and pointer users.
Example: <Dialog.Root bind:open={showDialog}>

### AlertDialog
Modal dialog requiring user confirmation.
Import: @dryui/ui
Subpath import: @dryui/ui/alert-dialog
Parts: Root, Trigger, Content, Overlay, Header, Body, Footer, Action, Cancel
Props: Root: open (boolean), Whether the overlay or disclosure is currently open., default false | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | Trigger: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | Content: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | Header: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | Body: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | Footer: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | Action: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | Cancel: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
Data attributes: data-alert-dialog-body | data-alert-dialog-content | data-alert-dialog-footer | data-alert-dialog-header | data-alert-dialog-overlay | data-alert-dialog-panel | data-alert-dialog-trigger | data-state
Accessibility: Ensure the trigger, popup role, and focus return behavior all describe the same interaction model. | Provide an obvious keyboard dismissal path and avoid putting essential actions in hover-only content. | Keep the opening control labeled, ensure focus moves predictably on open and close, and expose the popup type truthfully.
Example: <AlertDialog.Root>

### Drawer

Import: @dryui/ui
Subpath import: @dryui/ui/drawer
Parts: Root, Trigger, Content, Overlay, Header, Body, Footer, Close
Props: Root: open (boolean), Whether the overlay or disclosure is currently open., default false | side ('top' | 'right' | 'bottom' | 'left'), Preferred side for overlay placement., accepted top, right, bottom, left, default 'right' | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | Trigger: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | Content: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | Header: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | Body: padding (boolean), default true | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | Footer: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | Close: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
Data attributes: data-drawer-body | data-drawer-content | data-drawer-footer | data-drawer-header | data-drawer-overlay | data-drawer-panel | data-drawer-trigger | data-no-padding | data-side (Indicates the resolved placement side for the overlay surface., values top, right, bottom, left) | data-state (Reflects whether the drawer is open or closed., values open, closed)
Accessibility: Ensure the trigger, popup role, and focus return behavior all describe the same interaction model. | Provide an obvious keyboard dismissal path and avoid putting essential actions in hover-only content. | Keep the opening control labeled, ensure focus moves predictably on open and close, and expose the popup type truthfully.
Example: <Drawer.Root bind:open={drawerOpen}>

### Popover
Floating content panel anchored to a trigger.
Import: @dryui/ui
Subpath import: @dryui/ui/popover
Parts: Root, Trigger, Content
Props: Root: open (boolean), Whether the overlay or disclosure is currently open., default false, bindable | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | Trigger: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | Content: placement (| 'top'
	| 'top-start'
	| 'top-end'
	| 'bottom'
	| 'bottom-start'
	| 'bottom-end'
	| 'left'
	| 'left-start'
	| 'left-end'
	| 'right'
	| 'right-start'
	| 'right-end'), accepted top, top-start, top-end, bottom, bottom-start, bottom-end, left, left-start, left-end, right, right-start, right-end, default 'bottom' | offset (number), default 8 | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
Data attributes: data-popover-content | data-popover-trigger | data-state (Reflects whether the popover is open or closed., values open, closed)
Accessibility: Avoid placing essential actions in hover-only or transient content; keyboard users must be able to reopen the popover.
Example: <Popover.Root bind:open={popoverOpen}>

### Tooltip
Hover/focus popup with descriptive text.
Import: @dryui/ui
Subpath import: @dryui/ui/tooltip
Parts: Root, Trigger, Content
Props: Root: openDelay (number), default 700 | closeDelay (number), default 300 | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | Trigger: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | Content: placement (| 'top'
	| 'top-start'
	| 'top-end'
	| 'bottom'
	| 'bottom-start'
	| 'bottom-end'
	| 'left'
	| 'left-start'
	| 'left-end'
	| 'right'
	| 'right-start'
	| 'right-end'), accepted top, top-start, top-end, bottom, bottom-start, bottom-end, left, left-start, left-end, right, right-start, right-end, default 'top' | offset (number), default 8 | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
Data attributes: data-state | data-tooltip-content | data-tooltip-trigger
Accessibility: Ensure the trigger, popup role, and focus return behavior all describe the same interaction model. | Provide an obvious keyboard dismissal path and avoid putting essential actions in hover-only content. | Keep the opening control labeled, ensure focus moves predictably on open and close, and expose the popup type truthfully.
Example: <Tooltip.Root>

	| 'left-end'

### NotificationCenter

Import: @dryui/ui
Subpath import: @dryui/ui/notification-center
Parts: Root, Trigger, Panel, Item, Group
Props: Root: items (import('./context.svelte.js').NotificationItem[]), default $bindable<NotificationItem[]>([]), bindable | open (boolean), Whether the overlay or disclosure is currently open., default false, bindable | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | Trigger: children (Snippet<[{ unreadCount: number }]>), Content rendered inside the component., required | Panel: placement (| 'top'
	| 'top-start'
	| 'top-end'
	| 'bottom'
	| 'bottom-start'
	| 'bottom-end'
	| 'left'
	| 'left-start'
	| 'left-end'
	| 'right'
	| 'right-start'
	| 'right-end'), accepted top, top-start, top-end, bottom, bottom-start, bottom-end, left, left-start, left-end, right, right-start, right-end, default 'bottom-end' | offset (number), default 8 | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | Item: id (string), Unique HTML id used for labels, aria relationships, or targeted styling., required | read (boolean), default false | timestamp (Date) | variant ('info' | 'warning' | 'critical'), Visual style preset for the component., accepted info, warning, critical | action (Snippet) | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | Group: label (string), Visible label text shown for the control or item., required | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
Data attributes: data-id | data-notification-center-group | data-notification-center-item | data-notification-center-panel | data-notification-center-root | data-notification-center-trigger | data-part | data-state | data-variant
Accessibility: Ensure the trigger, popup role, and focus return behavior all describe the same interaction model. | Provide an obvious keyboard dismissal path and avoid putting essential actions in hover-only content. | Choose live-region urgency carefully and do not make short-lived announcements the only source of important information. | Keep the opening control labeled, ensure focus moves predictably on open and close, and expose the popup type truthfully.
Example: <NotificationCenter.Root bind:items={notifications} bind:open={panelOpen}>

### Category: Display

### Accordion
Collapsible content sections, single or multiple mode.
Import: @dryui/ui
Subpath import: @dryui/ui/accordion
Parts: Root, Item, Trigger, Content
Props: Root: type ('single' | 'multiple'), Accordion behavior mode for single or multiple expanded items., accepted single, multiple, default 'single' | value (string[]), Current controlled or bindable value., default [] | orientation ('horizontal' | 'vertical'), Horizontal or vertical layout direction., accepted horizontal, vertical, default 'vertical' | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | Item: value (string), Current controlled or bindable value., required | disabled (boolean), Prevents interaction and applies disabled styling., default false | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | Trigger: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | Content: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
Data attributes: data-accordion | data-accordion-content | data-accordion-content-inner | data-accordion-item | data-disabled (Present when the component or part is disabled.) | data-dry-stagger | data-indicator | data-orientation (Reflects the current horizontal or vertical orientation., values horizontal, vertical) | data-state (Reflects whether the current accordion item is expanded or collapsed., values open, closed)
Accessibility: Use descriptive trigger text so the hidden content is understandable before expansion. | Keep each trigger paired with its matching content so keyboard and screen-reader relationships stay intact.
Example: <Accordion.Root>

### Typography
Standalone semantic text exports: heading, text, code, blockquote.
Import: @dryui/ui
Subpath import: @dryui/ui/typography
Parts: Heading, Text, Code, Blockquote
Namespace parts only: no Root wrapper
Props: Heading: level (1 | 2 | 3 | 4 | 5 | 6), Heading level used to render semantic h1 through h6 output., accepted 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6 | variant ('default' | 'display'), Visual style preset for the component., accepted default, display, variant='display' uses --dry-font-display, which defaults to --dry-font-sans. Override --dry-font-display on body or a scoped wrapper (not :root) for a distinct display typeface. | maxMeasure ('narrow' | 'default' | 'wide' | false), Caps rendered inline size on an ergonomic text measure (ch unit). Pass narrow, default, or wide, or false to opt out., accepted narrow, default, wide, false, Caps the rendered inline size in ch units: narrow~22ch, default~45ch, wide~65ch. Use narrow for editorial hero headlines. | className (HTMLAttributes<HTMLHeadingElement>['class']) | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | Text: as ('p' | 'span' | 'div'), Text element to render for inline, block, or paragraph copy., accepted p, span, div | size ('xs' | 'sm' | 'md' | 'lg'), Size preset affecting density, spacing, or typography., accepted xs, sm, md, lg, Applies DryUI text scale tokens for compact or emphasized body copy. | font ('sans' | 'mono'), accepted sans, mono | weight ('normal' | 'medium' | 'semibold' | 'bold'), accepted normal, medium, semibold, bold | maxMeasure ('narrow' | 'default' | 'wide' | false), Caps rendered inline size on an ergonomic text measure (ch unit). Pass narrow, default, or wide, or false to opt out., accepted narrow, default, wide, false, Caps the rendered inline size in ch units: narrow~48ch, default~65ch, wide~80ch. | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component. | color ('default' | 'muted' | 'secondary'), Semantic color or tone applied to the component., accepted default, muted, secondary, Use muted or secondary for supporting copy without reaching for inline color styles. | variant ('default' | 'muted' | 'secondary' | 'label'), Visual style preset for the component., accepted default, muted, secondary, label | Code: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | Blockquote: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
Data attributes: none
Accessibility: Treat the component as presentational unless it exposes interactive affordances, and label any interactive affordances explicitly. | Keep heading, reading, and focus order aligned with the surrounding content.
Example: <Typography.Heading level={2}>Launch readiness</Typography.Heading>

### Heading
Standalone semantic heading export for starter-kit typography.
Import: @dryui/ui
Subpath import: @dryui/ui/heading
Props: level (1 | 2 | 3 | 4 | 5 | 6), Semantic heading level to render., accepted 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, default 2 | variant ('default' | 'display'), Visual style preset for the component., accepted default, display, default 'default', variant='display' uses --dry-font-display, which defaults to --dry-font-sans. For a distinct display typeface (e.g., a serif), override --dry-font-display on body or a scoped wrapper, not :root. See recipe: serif-display. | maxMeasure ('narrow' | 'default' | 'wide' | false), Caps rendered inline size on an ergonomic text measure (ch unit). Pass narrow, default, or wide, or false to opt out., accepted narrow, default, wide, false, default false, Caps the rendered inline size in ch units: narrow~22ch, default~45ch, wide~65ch. Use narrow for editorial hero headlines. Replaces the grid-wrapper hack that existed while dryui/no-width banned max-width. | className (HTMLAttributes<HTMLHeadingElement>['class']) | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
Data attributes: data-level | data-measure | data-variant
Accessibility: Treat the component as presentational unless it exposes interactive affordances, and label any interactive affordances explicitly. | Keep heading, reading, and focus order aligned with the surrounding content.
Example: <Heading level={2}>Launch readiness</Heading>

### Text
Standalone body copy export for starter-kit typography.
Import: @dryui/ui
Subpath import: @dryui/ui/text
Props: as ('p' | 'span' | 'div'), Underlying HTML element to render for the component., accepted p, span, div, default 'p' | color ('default' | 'muted' | 'secondary'), Semantic color or tone applied to the component., accepted default, muted, secondary, default 'default', Use muted or secondary for supporting copy without reaching for inline color styles. | size ('xs' | 'sm' | 'md' | 'lg'), Size preset affecting density, spacing, or typography., accepted xs, sm, md, lg, default 'md', Applies DryUI text scale tokens for compact or emphasized body copy. | font ('sans' | 'mono'), accepted sans, mono, default 'sans' | weight ('normal' | 'medium' | 'semibold' | 'bold'), accepted normal, medium, semibold, bold | variant ('default' | 'label'), Visual style preset for the component., accepted default, label, default 'default' | maxMeasure ('narrow' | 'default' | 'wide' | false), Caps rendered inline size on an ergonomic text measure (ch unit). Pass narrow, default, or wide, or false to opt out., accepted narrow, default, wide, false, default false, Caps the rendered inline size in ch units: narrow~48ch, default~65ch, wide~80ch. Defaults are wider than Heading because body copy reads better on a longer measure. | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component.
Data attributes: data-color | data-font | data-measure | data-size | data-variant | data-weight
Accessibility: Treat the component as presentational unless it exposes interactive affordances, and label any interactive affordances explicitly. | Keep heading, reading, and focus order aligned with the surrounding content.
Example: <Text as="p" color="secondary" size="sm">Use Text for supporting copy, labels, and starter-kit body content.</Text>

Parts: Root, Table, Header, Column, Body, Row, Cell, Pagination, SelectAll, SelectCell, ExpandableRow, ExpandTrigger
Props: Root: striped (boolean), default false | items (T[]), required | pageSize (number), default 10 | selectable (boolean), default false | onSelectionChange ((selected: string[]) => void) | actionBar (Snippet<[{ selectedCount: number; clearSelection: () => void }]>) | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | Table: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | Header: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | Column: key (string), required | sortable (boolean) | filterable (boolean) | pinned (boolean) | resizable (boolean) | header (Snippet) | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | Body: children (Snippet<[{ items: T[]; page: number }]>), Content rendered inside the component., required | Row: rowId (string) | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | Cell: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | Pagination: children (Snippet< [ { page: number; totalPages: number; totalItems: number; pageSize: number; canPrevious: boolean; canNext: boolean; previous: () => void; next: () => void; goto: (page: number) => void; } ] >), Content rendered inside the component. | SelectCell: rowId (string), required | rowLabel (string) | ExpandableRow: rowId (string), required | expandable (Snippet), required | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | ExpandTrigger: rowId (string), required | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component.

Accessibility: Treat the component as presentational unless it exposes interactive affordances, and label any interactive affordances explicitly. | Keep heading, reading, and focus order aligned with the surrounding content. | Expose the essential data in text form, such as a summary, value list, or table, rather than relying on the graphic alone.
Example: <DataGrid.Root items={rows} pageSize={10}>

Example: <Carousel.Root>

### Enter

Example: <Enter>Content</Enter>

### Exit
Exit wrapper that applies the `leave` Svelte transition. Pairs with {#if} blocks for a subtle dismissal (~12px offset + blur)..
Import: @dryui/ui
Subpath import: @dryui/ui/exit
Data attributes: data-dry-exit | data-dry-stagger
Accessibility: Treat the component as presentational unless it exposes interactive affordances, and label any interactive affordances explicitly. | Keep heading, reading, and focus order aligned with the surrounding content.
Example: <Exit>Content</Exit>

### Stagger
Iterates children with auto-assigned nth-child delays. `step` selects section (100ms), word (80ms), letter (40ms), or a custom millisecond value..
Import: @dryui/ui
Subpath import: @dryui/ui/stagger
Data attributes: data-dry-exit | data-dry-stagger
Accessibility: Treat the component as presentational unless it exposes interactive affordances, and label any interactive affordances explicitly. | Keep heading, reading, and focus order aligned with the surrounding content.
Example: <Stagger>Content</Stagger>

### AvatarGroup
Compact cluster of avatars with overflow and presence status.
Import: @dryui/primitives
Props: count (number), default 0 | maxVisible (number), default 4 | size ('sm' | 'md' | 'lg'), Size preset affecting density, spacing, or typography., accepted sm, md, lg, default 'md' | overlap ('sm' | 'md' | 'lg'), accepted sm, md, lg, default 'md' | status ('online' | 'offline' | 'busy' | 'away'), accepted online, offline, busy, away | label (string), Visible label text shown for the control or item., default 'Avatar group' | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
Data attributes: data-overflow | data-overlap | data-part | data-size | data-status
Accessibility: Treat the component as presentational unless it exposes interactive affordances, and label any interactive affordances explicitly. | Keep heading, reading, and focus order aligned with the surrounding content.
Example: <AvatarGroup>Content</AvatarGroup>

### ChatMessage
Single chat row with role, avatar, name, and typing state.
Import: @dryui/primitives
Props: role ('user' | 'assistant' | 'system'), accepted user, assistant, system, default 'user' | avatar (string) | name (string), Field name used during native form submission. | timestamp (string) | typing (boolean), default false | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
Data attributes: data-part | data-role | data-typing
Accessibility: Treat the component as presentational unless it exposes interactive affordances, and label any interactive affordances explicitly. | Keep heading, reading, and focus order aligned with the surrounding content. | Choose live-region urgency carefully and do not make short-lived announcements the only source of important information.
Example: <ChatMessage>Content</ChatMessage>

### EmptyState
Placeholder state with icon, title, description, and action.
Import: @dryui/primitives
Parts: Root, Icon, Title, Description, Action
Props: Root: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | Icon: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | Title: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | Description: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | Action: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
Data attributes: none
Accessibility: Treat the component as presentational unless it exposes interactive affordances, and label any interactive affordances explicitly. | Keep heading, reading, and focus order aligned with the surrounding content.
Example: <EmptyState.Root>

### LogoCloud
Grid of linked brand logos with responsive alignment.
Import: @dryui/primitives
Parts: Root, Item
Props: Root: columns (number), default 5 | gap (string) | align ('start' | 'center' | 'end'), Alignment for child content along the cross axis., accepted start, center, end | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | Item: href (string), Destination URL when the component renders as a link. | name (string), Field name used during native form submission. | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
Data attributes: data-part
Accessibility: Treat the component as presentational unless it exposes interactive affordances, and label any interactive affordances explicitly. | Keep heading, reading, and focus order aligned with the surrounding content.
Example: <LogoCloud.Root>

### Motion
Motion primitives module exported from @dryui/ui/motion: Enter/Exit/Stagger component wrappers plus `enter` / `leave` Svelte transition functions driven by --dry-enter-* and --dry-exit-* tokens..
Import: @dryui/primitives
Data attributes: none
Accessibility: Treat the component as presentational unless it exposes interactive affordances, and label any interactive affordances explicitly. | Keep heading, reading, and focus order aligned with the surrounding content.
Example: <Motion>Content</Motion>

### StatCard
Compact KPI card with label, value, and trend.
Import: @dryui/primitives
Parts: Root, Label, Value, Trend
Props: Root: tone ('neutral' | 'info' | 'success' | 'warning' | 'danger'), accepted neutral, info, success, warning, danger, default 'neutral' | density ('comfortable' | 'compact'), accepted comfortable, compact, default 'comfortable' | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | Label: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | Value: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | Trend: direction ('up' | 'down' | 'flat'), accepted up, down, flat, default 'flat' | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
Data attributes: data-density | data-direction | data-part | data-tone
Accessibility: Treat the component as presentational unless it exposes interactive affordances, and label any interactive affordances explicitly. | Keep heading, reading, and focus order aligned with the surrounding content.
Example: <StatCard.Root>

Data attributes: none

### Category: Feedback

### Alert
Contextual feedback message with variant styling.
Import: @dryui/ui
Subpath import: @dryui/ui/alert
Props: variant ('info' | 'success' | 'warning' | 'error'), Visual style preset for the component., accepted info, success, warning, error, default 'info' | dismissible (boolean), default false | onDismiss (() => void) | icon (Snippet) | title (Snippet), Primary heading or label text. | description (Snippet), Supporting copy that explains the current control or section. | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component.
Data attributes: data-alert | data-alert-body | data-alert-close | data-alert-description | data-alert-icon | data-alert-title | data-dismissible | data-variant
Accessibility: Do not rely on transient feedback as the only place critical workflow information appears. | Label dismiss or retry actions explicitly so their purpose is announced. | Choose live-region urgency carefully and do not make short-lived announcements the only source of important information.
Example: <Alert variant="info">

### Toast
Temporary notification message.
Import: @dryui/ui
Subpath import: @dryui/ui/toast
Parts: Provider, Root, Title, Description, Close, Action
Props: Provider: position ('top-right'
		| 'top-left'
		| 'bottom-right'
		| 'bottom-left'
		| 'top-center'
		| 'bottom-center'), accepted top-right, top-left, bottom-right, bottom-left, top-center, bottom-center, default 'bottom-right' | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component. | Root: id (string), Unique HTML id used for labels, aria relationships, or targeted styling., required | variant ('info' | 'success' | 'warning' | 'error'), Visual style preset for the component., accepted info, success, warning, error, default 'info' | persistent (boolean) | progress (number) | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | Title: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | Description: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | Close: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | Action: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | onclick (() => void)
Data attributes: data-dry-stagger | data-part | data-persistent | data-position | data-removing | data-toast-action | data-toast-id | data-variant
Accessibility: Do not rely on toast content as the only place critical workflow information appears.
Example: <Toast.Root>

### Progress

Data attributes: data-color | data-has-label | data-max | data-part | data-position | data-segmented | data-size | data-state | data-value | data-with-label
Accessibility: Do not rely on transient feedback as the only place critical workflow information appears. | Label dismiss or retry actions explicitly so their purpose is announced.
Example: <Progress value={65} max={100} />

### Category: Interaction

### DragAndDrop
Reorderable list with drag and keyboard support.
Import: @dryui/ui
Subpath import: @dryui/ui/drag-and-drop
Parts: Root, Item, Handle, Group
Props: Root: items (T[]), required | onReorder ((items: T[]) => void), required | orientation ('vertical' | 'horizontal'), Horizontal or vertical layout direction., accepted vertical, horizontal, default 'vertical' | listId (string) | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | Item: index (number), required | children (Snippet<[{ isDragging: boolean; isOver: boolean }]>), Content rendered inside the component., required | Handle: index (number), required | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component. | Group: onMove ((fromListId: string, fromIndex: number, toListId: string, toIndex: number) => void), required | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
Data attributes: data-dnd-grip | data-dnd-handle | data-dnd-instructions | data-dnd-item | data-dnd-live-region | data-dnd-preview | data-dnd-root | data-drag-active | data-dragging | data-handle | data-index | data-orientation (Reflects the current horizontal or vertical orientation., values horizontal, vertical) | data-over | data-over-end
Accessibility: Provide a clear accessible name for every interactive target and keep the action model consistent. | Match keyboard behavior to the established widget pattern rather than inventing a custom key map.
Example: <DragAndDrop.Root>

Data attributes: data-dry-portal

Data attributes: none
Accessibility: Treat the component as presentational unless it exposes interactive affordances, and label any interactive affordances explicitly. | Keep heading, reading, and focus order aligned with the surrounding content.

### FocusTrap
Traps keyboard focus within a container element.
Import: @dryui/ui
Subpath import: @dryui/ui/focus-trap
Props: active (boolean) | initialFocus (string) | returnFocus (boolean) | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component.
Data attributes: none
Accessibility: Treat the component as presentational unless it exposes interactive affordances, and label any interactive affordances explicitly. | Keep heading, reading, and focus order aligned with the surrounding content. | Keep the opening control labeled, ensure focus moves predictably on open and close, and expose the popup type truthfully.
Example: <FocusTrap>Content</FocusTrap>

### Hotkey
Keyboard shortcut handler with modifier support.
Import: @dryui/ui

### Category: Visual

### ChromaticShift

Import: @dryui/ui
Subpath import: @dryui/ui/chromatic-shift

Data attributes: data-active (Present on the active item or current target within the component.) | data-animated | data-channels | data-chromatic-shift | data-paused | data-reduced-motion
Accessibility: Treat the effect as decorative and keep underlying content understandable without color, blur, or motion alone. | Respect reduced-motion and contrast requirements when animation or filtering is enabled.
Example: <ChromaticShift>Content</ChromaticShift>

### Beam

Import: @dryui/ui
Subpath import: @dryui/ui/beam
Props: color (string), Semantic color or tone applied to the component., default 'var(--dry-color-fill-brand)' | width (number), default 2 | angle (number), default 45 | speed (number), default 3 | intensity (number), default 70 | blendMode (BlendMode) | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component.
Data attributes: data-beam | data-beam-layer | data-offscreen
Accessibility: Treat the effect as decorative and keep underlying content understandable without color, blur, or motion alone. | Respect reduced-motion and contrast requirements when animation or filtering is enabled.
Example: <Beam>Content</Beam>

### BorderBeam
Animated border-travel beam with masked ring highlights, bloom, and line-trace presets.
Import: @dryui/ui
Subpath import: @dryui/ui/border-beam
Props: size ('sm' | 'md' | 'line'), Effect mode preset: compact control ring (`sm`), full border glow (`md`), or bottom-edge line trace (`line`)., accepted sm, md, line | colorVariant ('colorful' | 'mono' | 'ocean' | 'sunset'), Beam palette preset matching the upstream colorful, mono, ocean, or sunset glow treatments., accepted colorful, mono, ocean, sunset | theme ('auto' | 'light' | 'dark'), Color tuning for dark or light surfaces, or system preference when set to `auto`., accepted auto, light, dark | staticColors (boolean) | duration (number) | active (boolean), Whether the beam is currently glowing. Disabling it plays the fade-out sequence before the effect becomes idle. | borderRadius (number | string), Optional border radius override for the beam host. When omitted, the first child radius is detected automatically. | brightness (number) | saturation (number) | hueRange (number) | strength (number), Intensity multiplier for the beam stroke, inner glow, and bloom layers. | onActivate (() => void), Callback fired after the beam fade-in animation completes. | onDeactivate (() => void), Callback fired after the beam fade-out animation completes. | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component.
Data attributes: data-active (Present while the beam is rendering its active glow and bloom layers.) | data-beam (Per-instance marker on the beam host used to scope the injected effect styles.) | data-beam-bloom (Bloom layer element that renders the outer glow spill around the active beam.) | data-fading (Present while the beam is playing its fade-out sequence.) | data-size (Reflects the current effect mode preset., values sm, md, line)
Accessibility: Treat the effect as decorative and keep underlying content understandable without color, blur, or motion alone. | Respect reduced-motion and contrast requirements when animation or filtering is enabled.
Example: <BorderBeam>Content</BorderBeam>

### Shimmer
Warm highlight sweep that travels across wrapped text and inline icons together.
Import: @dryui/ui
Subpath import: @dryui/ui/shimmer
Props: color (string), Semantic color or tone applied to the component., default 'var(--dry-color-fill-brand)' | duration (number), default 3 | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
Data attributes: data-active (Present on the active item or current target within the component.) | data-shimmer | data-shimmer-base | data-shimmer-streak
Accessibility: Treat the effect as decorative and keep underlying content understandable without color, blur, or motion alone. | Respect reduced-motion and contrast requirements when animation or filtering is enabled.
Example: <Shimmer>Content</Shimmer>

### GradientMesh

### Halftone

Data attributes: data-dot-size | data-halftone | data-halftone-content

Example: <Halftone>Content</Halftone>

### MaskReveal
